---
title: "Lennart Bedarf"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lennartbedarf
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lenn19
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-Mail
      href: mailto:lennart.bedarf@unibas.ch
    - icon: globe
      text: Research Group 
      href: https://dbe.unibas.ch/en/research/imaging-modelling-diagnosis/forensic-medicine-imaging-research-group/
---

PhD Candidate in Biomedical Engineering

University of Basel \| Research Group for Forensic Medicine & Imaging
